title: DFU Success Screen Displays Charge Stand Name After Updating Only Charge Stand Firmware
steps: 1. Connect the headset and Charge Stand to the test system.
2. Launch the firmware update application.
3. Select 'Charge Stand' as the device to update.
4. Initiate the DFU process for the Charge Stand firmware only.
5. Wait for the DFU process to complete successfully.
6. Observe the success screen displayed after the update.
expected: The success screen shows 'Charge Stand' (or the exact Charge Stand device name) as the updated device. The headset name is NOT displayed anywhere on the success screen.

title: DFU Success Screen Displays Headset Name After Updating Only Headset Firmware
steps: 1. Connect the headset and Charge Stand to the test system.
2. Launch the firmware update application.
3. Select 'Headset' as the device to update.
4. Initiate the DFU process for the headset firmware only.
5. Wait for the DFU process to complete successfully.
6. Observe the success screen displayed after the update.
expected: The success screen shows the headset name (e.g., 'Headset' or the specific headset model name) as the updated device. The Charge Stand name is NOT displayed on the success screen.

title: DFU Success Screen Displays Correct Names After Updating Both Headset and Charge Stand Sequentially
steps: 1. Connect the headset and Charge Stand to the test system.
2. Launch the firmware update application.
3. Update the headset firmware first via DFU.
4. Verify the success screen shows the headset name.
5. Dismiss the success screen.
6. Update the Charge Stand firmware via DFU.
7. Verify the success screen shows the Charge Stand name.
expected: After the headset update, the success screen displays the headset name. After the Charge Stand update, the success screen displays the Charge Stand name. Each success screen correctly reflects the device that was just updated.

title: DFU Success Screen Displays Charge Stand Name When Charge Stand Is Updated While Headset Is Disconnected
steps: 1. Connect only the Charge Stand to the test system (headset disconnected or powered off).
2. Launch the firmware update application.
3. Select 'Charge Stand' as the device to update.
4. Initiate the DFU process for the Charge Stand firmware only.
5. Wait for the DFU process to complete successfully.
6. Observe the success screen displayed after the update.
expected: The success screen shows 'Charge Stand' (or the exact Charge Stand device name) as the updated device. The headset name is not displayed since the headset was not connected.

title: DFU Success Screen Displays Correct Device Name After Charge Stand Update With Custom Device Names
steps: 1. Connect the headset and Charge Stand to the test system.
2. Rename the headset to a custom name (e.g., 'My Headset').
3. Rename the Charge Stand to a custom name (e.g., 'My Stand').
4. Launch the firmware update application.
5. Select the Charge Stand for firmware update.
6. Initiate and complete the DFU process.
7. Observe the success screen.
expected: The success screen displays the custom Charge Stand name ('My Stand') as the updated device. The custom headset name ('My Headset') is NOT displayed on the success screen.

title: DFU Success Screen Does Not Display Headset Name After Charge Stand Update When Both Devices Have Similar Names
steps: 1. Connect the headset and Charge Stand to the test system.
2. Rename both devices to similar names (e.g., 'Device A' for headset and 'Device A' for Charge Stand, or names that share common substrings).
3. Launch the firmware update application.
4. Select the Charge Stand for firmware update.
5. Initiate and complete the DFU process.
6. Observe the success screen.
expected: The success screen displays the correct Charge Stand name (the name assigned to the Charge Stand). The headset name is not incorrectly substituted on the success screen, even when names are similar.
